test-method.name: createJobAPITest
test-method.description: Verifying if create job api is able to create Inwarranty job

param.value: CreateJobPayload[mst_service_location_id=0, mst_platform_id=2, mst_warrenty_status_id=1, mst_oem_id=1, customer=Customer[first_name=Ganesh, last_name=Iyengar, mobile_number=7019767369, mobile_number_alt=7021867037, email_id=swara.jha@rediffmail.com, email_id_alt=bishnu.gowda@hotmail.com], customer_address=CustomerAddress[flat_number=906, apartment_name=8292 Chaten Heights, street_name=34696 Basanti Greens, landmark=837 Adiga Mill, area=17767 Johar Crest, pincode=3905, country=China, state=Dadar and Nagar Haveli], customer_product=CustomerProduct[dop=2026-04-09T11:06:44.777406800Z, serial_number=47798992704149, imei1=47798992704149, imei2=47798992704149, popurl=https://www.aadinath-dhawan.com:42076/molestias/sapiente?occaecati=necessitatibus&qui=dicta#illo, product_id=1, mst_model_id=2], problems=[Problem[id=6, remark=Nemo alias saepe ipsam nulla quam.]]]
